leadText: Pokémon Ranger (ポケモンレンジャー) has several referrals:

sections.title: Spin-off series games
sections.text: Spin-off series games [ edit | edit source ] The Pokémon Ranger series . Pokémon Ranger (video game) , the first game in that series for the Nintendo DS . Pokémon Ranger (Ranger series) , an occupation in that series.

sections.title: Core series games
sections.text: Core series games [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Ranger (Trainer class) , a Trainer class first seen in Generation III . Rangers (Trainer class) , a Double Battle Trainer class consisting of two Pokémon Rangers, first seen in Generation VI .
